$comment: Velarro Estate — module queue in dependency order. STATUS: PARTIAL. Only M00-foundations is defined; screen-derived modules require the screen manifest, which is empty because Figma MCP ingestion was rate-limited on 2026-07-01 with zero data retrieved. Modules M01+ are added by the continuation run — inventing them now would fabricate screens.
executionRules: Strict dependency order; one module per implementation run
No implementation before the user sends START VELARRO IMPLEMENTATION
Overlay surfaces ship with their host screen's module
One screen with three breakpoints is one module entry, not three

modules.moduleName: Foundations: tokens, fonts, layout shell, component scaffolding
routes: / (layout and globals only; page replacement belongs to the entry-screen module)
sharedComponents: components/ui and components/layout scaffolding per shared-component-plan.json conventions
requiredAssets: brand font files if not on Google Fonts (U-05)
modules.responsiveRequirements: Breakpoint tokens from design-tokens.json mapped to Tailwind v4 @theme; unknown until ingestion
modules.interactions: None (non-visual module apart from base typography/colors)
modules.accessibilityRequirements: Base document semantics: lang attribute (exists), landmark structure in root layout, focus-visible styling, color tokens meeting WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (U-08)
implementationSteps: Map Figma variables to @theme CSS variables in app/globals.css
Implement font strategy (next/font/google or next/font/local per U-05); remove body Arial override
Replace create-next-app metadata, favicon, and public/ placeholder SVGs with Velarro branding
Create components/ui, components/layout, and public/images + public/icons structure
Add app/not-found.tsx and app/error.tsx aligned to wireframe styling if such screens exist, else minimal branded versions
Install and configure approved testing stack (see testing-plan.md) if approved
testRequirements: unit smoke test for token presence once test runner exists
visualVerificationRequirements: Typography and color sample page compared against Figma token values
